metadata.title: Topaz Video Upscaler - AI Video Enhancer | Marble AI

introduce.title: About Topaz Video Upscaler
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Topaz Video Upscaler API delivers professional-grade AI video enhancement, restoring detail, reducing noise, and providing high-quality upscaling to 1080p or 4K resolution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Topaz Video Upscaler.

items.title: What is Topaz Video Upscaler?
items.description: Topaz Video Upscaler is a professional-grade AI video enhancement model that restores detail, reduces noise, and upscales resolution.

items.title: What generation modes does it support?
items.description: Topaz Video Upscaler specializes in Video To Video enhancement and upscaling.

items.title: Who created Topaz Video Upscaler?
items.description: Topaz Video Upscaler is created by Topaz Labs, a leading image and video enhancement company.

items.title: What makes it unique?
items.description: Topaz excels at detail restoration, noise reduction, and professional-grade upscaling to 4K.

items.title: Can I use it commercially?
items.description: Yes! All videos enhanced with Topaz through Marble AI come with full commercial rights.

items.title: What resolutions does it support?
items.description: Topaz supports upscaling to 1080p and 4K resolutions with professional quality.

cta.title: Ready to Try Topaz Video Upscaler?
cta.description: Experience Topaz's professional video enhancement. Restore detail and upscale to 4K.
